description: Pre-existing on fz-tkf at bd174ea76 (verified via clean worktree): tests/fz2_cli.rs build_executes_case_and_with_fixtures and run_and_interp_execute_case_and_with_fixtures fail with 'error[parse/expected-token]: unsupported expression prefix in compiler2 front door: With' on fixtures/case_tuple_pattern_sequential/input.fz. src/compiler2/frontdoor.rs:638-664 handles If/Cond/Receive/Case/Fn but has no Tok::With arm. fz-rh2.11.3 lowered case/with/cond through dispatch_matrix, but the quoted front door never gained with. Blocks any 'full green' gate that includes the fz2_cli integration tests (e.g. fz-knf.5).
title: Compiler2 front door: parse with expressions
